retry_reason: Not applicable; the put operation never fails and the caller cannot retry.
contract_summary: Release a reference on a devlink_rel structure. If this was the last reference (refcount reaches zero), devlink_rel_free is called to deallocate the structure. After calling this function, the caller must not access the rel pointer as the object may have been freed. This function returns void and does not indicate whether the object was freed; the caller must have previously acquired a reference via a corresponding get wrapper.

judge.reason: The function solely decrements the refcount and conditionally frees the object; no other logic is present.
